subject: Unable to log in to my account
description: I have been unable to log in to my account since yesterday. I keep getting an 'invalid credentials' error even though I am using the correct password.

subject: Billing discrepancy on last invoice
description: My last invoice shows a charge of $149.99 but my plan is $99.99 per month. I was not notified of any price change.

subject: Feature request: dark mode
description: I would love to have a dark mode option in the application. It would be much easier on the eyes during late-night work sessions.

subject: Data export not working
description: When I try to export my data as CSV, the download starts but the file is empty. I have tried multiple browsers and the issue persists.

subject: Account upgrade request
description: I would like to upgrade my account from the Basic plan to the Professional plan. Please let me know the steps and any prorated charges.

subject: API rate limiting issues
description: Our integration is hitting rate limits even though we are well below the documented thresholds. This is impacting our production system.

subject: Password reset email not received
description: I requested a password reset but never received the email. I have checked my spam folder as well.

subject: Slow dashboard loading times
description: The main dashboard takes over 30 seconds to load. This started about a week ago and has not improved.
